author: Manson, Ken
title: Kayan-English/English-Kayan dictionary
notes:
from Toolbox MDF file

Manson (26 Jan 2010): "I think that the Kayan dictionary is of good phonological quality, there may be some errors in tone marking, but the consonants and rhymes are of high quality. Note that /z/ and /y/ are in free variation in the Standard (Pekon) Kayan speech."

see also "Kayan Phonology.pdf" (chapter from forthcoming diss.)
